title: Share Your Story
meta-description: Have you enrolled in coverage using HealthCare.gov? Tell us why having health insurance is important to you.
bite: Have you enrolled in coverage using HealthCare.gov? Tell us why having health insurance is important to you.
excerpt: Have you enrolled in coverage using HealthCare.gov? Tell us why having health insurance is important to you.
content:
Have you enrolled in coverage using HealthCare.gov? Tell us why having health insurance is important to you.

You can also use the hashtag #GetCovered to share your story on X (formerly Twitter) and Facebook.

Visit our YouTube channel to see all Healthcare.gov videos and subscribe.

Connect with us

Don't miss the latest reminders and updates from the Health Insurance Marketplace®. Follow HealthCare.gov on our social media channels and tell us what you think!

More ways to connect with us

Follow us on X, formerly Twitter.

Like us on Facebook.

Watch us on YouTube.
